title: Infosys Obtains SEC Exemptive Relief for Proposed ₹ 18,000 Crore Buyback
detailed_summary: Infosys stated that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission granted the company requested exemptive relief dated September 11, 2025 for its proposed buyback. The buyback was approved by the Board of Directors on September 11, 2025 and covers up to 10,00,00,000 fully paidup equity shares of face value of ₹ 5/ - each for an aggregate amount up to ₹ 18,000 Crore. The buyback remains subject to shareholder approval through a special resolution by postal ballot. The record date and public announcement with process, timelines, and statutory details will be released later.

key_facts.fact: The Board of Directors approved a proposal to buy back up to 10,00,00,000 fully paidup equity shares of face value of ₹ 5/ - each.
The proposed buyback amount aggregates up to ₹ 18,000 Crore (Rupees Eighteen Thousand Crore only).
Infosys obtained requested exemptive relief from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission by way of a letter dated September 11, 2025.
The exemptive relief related to certain aspects of tender offer procedures due to conflicting regulatory requirements between Indian and U.S. laws for tender offer buybacks.
The buyback is subject to approval of shareholders by way of a special resolution through postal ballot.
The record date for the buyback will be determined in due course.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys proposed to buy back up to 10,00,00,000 fully paidup equity shares of face value of ₹ 5/ - each, subject to shareholder approval by special resolution through postal ballot.
corporate_actions.amount_or_ratio: up to ₹ 18,000 Crore (Rupees Eighteen Thousand Crore only)

litigation_or_regulatory_matters.description: Infosys obtained requested exemptive relief from the SEC on certain aspects of the tender offer procedures for the proposed buyback.

risk_factors.risk: The buyback has not yet been approved by Infosys shareholders and has not yet commenced.
risk_factors.potential_impact: The buyback will proceed only if approved by shareholders.
risk_factors.section_heading: Additional information pursuant to U.S. Law
